nasb.text: While they were talking and discussing, Jesus Himself approached and began traveling with them.

esv.text: While they were talking and discussing together, Jesus himself drew near and went with them.

cnv.text: 正在交談議論的時候，耶穌親自走近他們，與他們同行，

ccb.text: 正谈论的时候，耶稣走过来和他们同行。

csbs.text: 在他们交谈讨论的时候，耶稣亲自走近他们，与他们同行，
